title: Lab: Deliver an Inclusive Neighborhood Event Hub
summary: Lab: Deliver an Inclusive Neighborhood Event Hub retrieves prior HTML skills in an original neighborhood event hub handoff scenario and requires source, parsed-structure, keyboard, and content evidence.
objectives: Apply semantic landmarks, semantic heading outline, semantic time address quotes, semantic native first in unfamiliar content.
Produce or audit a real neighborhood event hub handoff artifact without appearance-only reasoning.
Keep earlier document requirements active while verifying native behavior and valid relationships.

starterFiles.html: <!-- Continue the Heat Relief Network artifact here. -->

options.text: Neighborhood event hub handoff case 1: use main for every visually large panel so assistive technology finds all important boxes.
Neighborhood event hub handoff case 1: choose each region from its content relationship and navigation purpose, then verify the resulting landmark map.
Neighborhood event hub handoff case 1: wrap every paragraph in nav because users may want to reach it.
